title: On-Call Dispatch Schedule Configuration
description: Declarative configuration for resolving PagerDuty on-call schedules and publishing them to Slack.

tenant.description: PagerDuty tenant hostname. This maps to an environment variable named PAGERDUTY_API_KEY_<TENANT>, with dots replaced by underscores.
tenant.title: Tenant

schedule_groups.description: Slack output sections keyed by group name. Each group contains one or more PagerDuty schedule entries and optional group-level Slack routing.
schedule_groups.title: Schedule Groups

PagerDutyScheduleGroup.description: A Slack output section with one or more PagerDuty schedules and optional Slack user group sync.

slack_group_id.description: Optional Slack user group ID to update with the resolved users for this schedule group.
slack_group_id.title: Slack Group Id

swap_on_odd_weeks.description: When true, swap the two entries in this group during odd ISO week numbers. Only valid when the group has exactly two entries.
swap_on_odd_weeks.title: Swap On Odd Weeks

PagerDutyScheduleGroup.title: PagerDutyScheduleGroup

PagerDutyScheduleEntries.description: One or more PagerDuty schedules to resolve for this Slack section.
PagerDutyScheduleEntries.title: PagerDutyScheduleEntries

schedule_id.description: PagerDuty schedule ID to query for the current on-call user.
schedule_id.title: Schedule Id

label.description: Human-readable label used in the Slack message or channel topic.
label.title: Label

slack_space.description: Slack workspace hostname. This maps to an environment variable named SLACK_API_KEY_<WORKSPACE>, with dots replaced by underscores.
slack_space.title: Slack Space

slack_channel_id.description: Slack channel ID to update or post to.
slack_channel_id.title: Slack Channel Id

set_channel_topic.description: When true, update the Slack channel topic. When false, post a normal Slack channel message.
set_channel_topic.title: Set Channel Topic

id.description: Stable identifier for this schedule configuration.
id.title: Id

schedule.description: Cadence this file should run for. The CLI --frequency value must match this field unless the file is intentionally skipped.

suspended.description: When true, skip this schedule configuration without making changes.
suspended.title: Suspended

pagerduty.description: PagerDuty tenant and schedule entries to resolve.

message_header.description: Optional text prepended to the rendered Slack message or topic.
message_header.title: Message Header

message_footer.description: Optional text appended to the rendered Slack message or topic.
examples: Escalate in PagerDuty if immediate help is needed.
message_footer.title: Message Footer
